untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental metrics (P/E ratio 20-35, institutional accumulation, fundamental thesis evaluation) which are NOT available in the allowed technical indicator set. P/E ratios, fundamental quality metrics, and institutional flow data require external fundamental/market microstructure data sources not present in the technical indicator list. The 'minimum_fundamental_filters: 2' parameter cannot be operationalized with technical indicators alone.
translation_notes: Attempted technical proxy: Used price above 200-day MA to approximate 'early-to-mid emerging stage with positive trend' and volume ratio > 1.0 to approximate 'institutional accumulation or positive trend'. Exit condition uses ADX < 20 to detect trend deterioration. However, this is a lossy translation—the original signal's core logic (quality growth metrics + reasonable valuation) cannot be fully captured without fundamental data access. Recommend implementing this signal with a fundamental data connector that can validate P/E range and quality metrics before entry.
